popularStory.headline: RICHARD BALDWIN BORN 1503
popularStory.description: RICHARD1 BALDWIN was born 1503 in Dundridge, Aston Clinton, Buckingham, England, and died February 1552/53 in Aston Clinton, Buckingham, England. He married ELLEN APUKE. She was born 1507 in Aston Cli …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Apuke於1507年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓時，她的父親John Aston Apuke20歲，母親Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwin23歲。她於大約1527年與Richard Baldwin I在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於從1565年11月17日到1566年11月16日在英國巴金哈姆爾，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Apuke于1507年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓时，她的父亲John Aston Apuke20岁，母亲Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwin23岁。她于大约1527年与Richard Baldwin I在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于从1565年11月17日到1566年11月16日在英国巴金哈姆爾，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Apuke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pook
meanings: English (mainly Devon): nickname from Middle English p(o)uk(e), poke ‘goblin, (evil or mischievous) spirit’ (Old English pūca).

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Apuke was born in 1507, in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, John Aston Apuke, was 20 and her mother, Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwin, was 23. She married Richard Baldwin I about 1527, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died from 17 November 1565 to 16 November 1566, in Buckinghamshire, England, and was buried in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Apuke est née en 1507, à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Aston Apuke, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwin, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Baldwin I environ 1527, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée du 17 novembre 1565 au 16 novembre 1566, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Apuke 1507 in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Aston Apuke 20 und ihre Mutter Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwin 23. Sie hat um 1527 in Buckinghamshire, England Richard Baldwin I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb von 17. November 1565 bis 16. November 1566 in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Richard Baldwin I circa 1527, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Apukeが1507年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンで生まれた時，父John Aston Apukeは20歳，母Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwinは23歳であった。約1527年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでRichard Baldwin Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はから1565年11月17日まで1566年11月16日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Apuke(이)가 1507년 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Aston Apuke(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwin(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1527년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Richard Baldwin I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 11월 17일부터 1566년 11월 16일까지 영국 벅잉함실르에서 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Apuke nasceu em 1507, em Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Aston Apuke, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwin, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Baldwin I aproximadamente 1527, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu de 17 de novembro de 1565 a 16 de novembro de 1566, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Aston Clinton St Leonard, Buckinghamshir: астон клинтон ст леонард, буккингхамшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Apuke родилась в 1507 г. в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Aston Apuke было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwin, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Baldwin I около 1527 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла с 17 ноября 1565 по 16 ноября 1566 в местности буккингхамшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Apuke nació en 1507, en Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Aston Apuke, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine Alice Anne d'Baldwin, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Richard Baldwin I aproximadamente 1527, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió desde 17 de noviembre de 1565 hasta 16 de noviembre de 1566, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
